forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Patchy fog before 5am. Mostly clear, with a low around 47. Southwest wind around 5 mph.

forecast.name: Saturday
forecast.detailedForecast: Sunny, with a high near 77. Southwest wind 6 to 12 mph.

weather_report:
As the early morning unfolds in Boston, a gentle veil of patchy fog lingers, slowly retreating with the arrival of dawn. The air is cool and crisp, perhaps hinting at the softly fading remnants of night, while the promise of a sunny day hovers just beyond the horizon. With the forecast predicting clear skies and a comfortable high around 77 later today, you can anticipate a transformation that will bathe the city in warm, inviting light, perfect for strollers and seekers of the outdoors.

Dressing thoughtfully for such a pleasant transition might involve a light layer against the morning chill, swapping it later for something more breathable as the sun takes center stage. Perhaps a leisurely stroll along the Esplanade or a visit to a local café would suit the mood, as the city awakens and its rhythms quicken. Life in Boston today seems to invite introspection as well as activity, perfect for those who appreciate both the rush of nature and the slow unfolding of a tranquil morning.
